Stable.releaseNotes:
<!-- Minimum Server Version: **5.3.3.0** -->
> [!Warning]
> This version requires a **Shoko Server** of at least version **5.3.3.0** to function. Attempting to use this package with a **Shoko Server** which does not meet this requirement will result in a locked UI.



## What's Changed
* Fix anidb rules modal by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1341

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/compare/v2.5.5...v2.5.6

<!-- Minimum Server Version: **5.3.3.0** -->
> [!Warning]
> This version requires a **Shoko Server** of at least version **5.3.3.0** to function. Attempting to use this package with a **Shoko Server** which does not meet this requirement will result in a locked UI.



## What's Changed
* Backport changes from daily by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1336

## Features

- **Server & WebUI update check modals** — New update notification system with `ServerUpdateModal`, `WebUIUpdateModal`, and `UpdateModal`; checks for latest server/WebUI releases and displays them in-app
- **Release Management rewrite** — Replaced the release management UI with a modal-based workflow including `DuplicatesInfo`, `MultipleReleasesInfo`, `ReleaseManagementModal` with confirmation prompts
- **Import folder delete safeguards** — Added `ConfirmationPromptModal` with `keepAssociatedFileRecords` checkbox before deleting import folders
- **AniDB rules confirmation** — Added confirmation modal for AniDB rules when linking files via avdump
- **Filter presets & utility QoL** — New `ConfirmationPromptModal` for filter presets, improved utility tab interactions
- **Hotkey infrastructure** — Added `react-hotkeys-hook` dependency with `HotkeysProvider`, keyboard shortcut support for modals
- **Thumbnails made optional** — Backward-compatible type relaxation so episodes without thumbnails don't break

## Fixes

- **AniDB episode title** — Use AniDB title for AniDB episodes on TMDB linking page
- **Unrecognized tab** — Scoped `dumpInProgress` to selected rows only
- **Error page** — Improved 404/no-route-match error handling in `ErrorBoundary`
- **Sentry fixes** — Error boundary improvements, toast JSON parse safety, React key fixes in release management
- **useDeleteFileMutation** — Changed `removeFolder` from body to query param (matching server API)
- **Versioning/toast/CSS** — Improved version display, import folder formatting, toast positioning

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/compare/v2.5.4...v2.5.5

* refactor: align episode type in APIv3 closer to the plugin abstraction by @revam in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1277
* Add AGENTS.md, update README.md by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1278

## What's Changed

* Remove tvdb actions by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1266
* Use the wrong spelling for "Cancelled" to ignore sentry event by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1267
* fix: set default value for Plex authentication status by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1268
* Add new Trakt actions by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1269
* Move min server version to version.json & add to release notes by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1270
* Fix release notes by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1271
* Forgot a `#` by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1272
* repo: update mininum server version by @revam in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1273


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/compare/v2.5.0...v2.5.1

## What's Changed
* Update to node24, update deps and cleanup by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1251
* Fix typo in README.md from 'offesnse' to 'offense' by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1252
* Fix selected checkbox in browser folder modal by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1253
* debug build for checking sentry sourcemap issue by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1254
* fix sentry sourcemaps by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1255
* stop sentry from uploading duplicate sourcemaps by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1256
* Fix sentry sourcemaps... again by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1257
* fix vite local build by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1258
* fix issue with max number value on inputs by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1259
* ignore monaco and extension errors in sentry by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1260
* Update lodash to fix security issue by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1261
* add filter sidebar button tooltips to match docs descriptions by @natyusha in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1263
* Fix nullable issue in LinkFilesTab by @harshithmohan in https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/pull/1264


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShokoAnime/Shoko-WebUI/compare/v2.4.1...v2.5.0
